<li id="cite_note-BlockWilson609-310"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-BlockWilson609_310-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-BlockWilson609_310-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text"><a href="#CITEREFBlockWilson2010">Block &amp; Wilson 2010</a>, p. <a class="external text" href="https://books.google.com/books?id=vpbuSXSSqdkC&amp;pg=PA609" rel="nofollow">609</a>. "Steven Spielberg, by far the most successful director of the decade, had the highest-grossing movie with 1982's <i>E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial</i>, which grossed over $664 million in worldwide box office on initial release."</span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-BlockWilson652-311"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-BlockWilson652_311-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><a href="#CITEREFBlockWilson2010">Block &amp; Wilson 2010</a>, p. <a class="external text" href="https://books.google.com/books?id=vpbuSXSSqdkC&amp;pg=PA652" rel="nofollow">652</a>. "Production Cost: $12.2 (Unadjusted $s in Millions of $s)."</span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-312"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-312">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><i>Return of the Jedi</i>
<ul><li>Total: <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?id=starwars6.htm" rel="nofollow">"Return of the Jedi (1983)"</a>. <i><a href="/wiki/Box_Office_Mojo" title="Box Office Mojo">Box Office Mojo</a></i><span class="reference-accessdate">. <li>Special edition: <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?id=starwars6se.htm" rel="nofollow">"Return of the Jedi (Special Edition)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 10,</span> 2012</span>. <q>North America: $45,470,437; Overseas: $43,790,543</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Return+of+the+Jedi+%28Special+Edition%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fid%3Dstarwars6se.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul>
</span></li>

<ul><li>Original release: <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?id=backtothefuture.htm" rel="nofollow">"Back to the Future (1985)"</a>. <i><a href="/wiki/Box_Office_Mojo" title="Box Office Mojo">Box Office Mojo</a></i><span class="reference-accessdate">. <li>2014 reissue: <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://boxofficemojo.com/movies/intl/?id=_fBACKTOTHEFUTURE02" rel="nofollow">"Back to the Future (2014 re-issue)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">August 31,</span> 2014</span>. <q>United Kingdom: $5,628,876</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Back+to+the+Future+%282014+re-issue%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fboxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2Fintl%2F%3Fid%3D_fBACKTOTHEFUTURE02&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul>
</span></li>
<li id="cite_note-317"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-317">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><a href="#CITEREFFinler2003">Finler 2003</a>, p. <a class="external text" href="https://books.google.com/books?id=rvVhEJmbfrsC&amp;pg=PA268" rel="nofollow">268</a>. "The studio had a record operating income of $212 million in 1982, the year of Spielberg's <i>E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial</i> (which had cost only slightly over $10 million) and $150 million in 1985, mainly due to another Spielberg production, the $22 million Back to the Future, which became the top box office hit of the year."</span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-318"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-318">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="http://pro.boxoffice.com/movie/10391/top-gun" rel="nofollow">"Top Gun"</a>. <i><a class="mw-redirect" href="/wiki/Boxoffice_(magazine)" title="Boxoffice (magazine)">Boxoffice</a></i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">May 29,</span> 2016</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Boxoffice&amp;rft.atitle=Top+Gun&amp;rft_id=http%3A%2F%2Fpro.boxoffice.com%2Fmovie%2F10391%2Ftop-gun&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-319"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-319">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation cs2" id="CITEREFMcAdams2010">McAdams, Frank (2010), <i>Top Gun</i>, pp. <a class="external text" href="https://books.google.co.uk/books?id=vpbuSXSSqdkC&amp;pg=PA678#v=twopage" rel="nofollow">678–679</a>, <q>Production Cost: $19.0 (Millions of $s) ... Despite mixed reviews, it played in the top 10 for an extended period and was a huge hit, grossing almost $345 million in worldwide box office.</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Abook&amp;rft.genre=book&amp;rft.btitle=Top+Gun&amp;rft.pages=678-679&amp;rft.date=2010&amp;rft.aulast=McAdams&amp;rft.aufirst=Frank&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span> In: <a href="#CITEREFBlockWilson2010">Block &amp; Wilson 2010</a>.</span>

"Production Cost: $30.0 (Unadjusted $s in Millions of $s)"</span>
</li>

<li id="cite_note-344"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-344">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation news cs1" id="CITEREFBrzeski2019">Brzeski, Patrick (June 25, 2019). <a class="external text" href="https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/china-film-eight-hundred-cancels-release-suspected-government-pressure-1220847" rel="nofollow">"China's $80M War Film 'The Eight Hundred' Cancels Release After Suspected Government Pressure"</a>. <i><a href="/wiki/The_Hollywood_Reporter" title="The Hollywood Reporter">The Hollywood Reporter</a></i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">March 1,</span> 2021</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=article&amp;rft.jtitle=The+Hollywood+Reporter&amp;rft.atitle=China%27s+%2480M+War+Film+%27The+Eight+Hundred%27+Cancels+Release+After+Suspected+Government+Pressure&amp;rft.date=2019-06-25&amp;rft.aulast=Brzeski&amp;rft.aufirst=Patrick&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.hollywoodreporter.com%2Fnews%2Fchina-film-eight-hundred-cancels-release-suspected-government-pressure-1220847&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>

<li id="cite_note-345"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-345">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/title/tt13364790/?ref_=bo_se_r_1" rel="nofollow">"Hi, Mom"</a>. <i><a href="/wiki/Box_Office_Mojo" title="Box Office Mojo">Box Office Mojo</a></i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">March 9,</span> 2021</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Hi%2C+Mom&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Ftitle%2Ftt13364790%2F%3Fref_%3Dbo_se_r_1&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-Time_(1940)-380"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Time_(1940)_380-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation news cs1"><span class="cs1-lock-subscription" title="Paid subscription required"><a class="external text" href="http://www.time.com/time/magazine/article/0,9171,763541,00.html" rel="nofollow">"Show Business: Record Wind"</a></span>. <i><a href="/wiki/Time_(magazine)" title="Time (magazine)">Time</a></i>. February 19, 1940. <a class="external text" href="https://web.archive.org/web/20100202110029/http://www.time.com/time/magazine/article/0,9171,763541,00.html" rel="nofollow">Archived</a> from the original on February 2, 2010<span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 19,</span> 2013</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=article&amp;rft.jtitle=Time&amp;rft.atitle=Show+Business%3A+Record+Wind&amp;rft.date=1940-02-19&amp;rft_id=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.time.com%2Ftime%2Fmagazine%2Farticle%2F0%2C9171%2C763541%2C00.html&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-Thomas_(1963)-381"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Thomas_(1963)_381-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation news cs1" id="CITEREFThomas1963"><a href="/wiki/Bob_Thomas_(reporter)" title="Bob Thomas (reporter)">Thomas, Bob</a> (August 1, 1963). "Movie Finances Are No Longer Hidden From Scrutiny". <i><a href="/wiki/The_Robesonian" title="The Robesonian">The Robesonian</a></i>. <a href="/wiki/Associated_Press" title="Associated Press">Associated Press</a>. p. <a class="external text" href="https://news.google.com/newspapers?id=QsBVAAAAIBAJ&amp;sjid=iUANAAAAIBAJ&amp;pg=7022,1836881" rel="nofollow">10</a>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=article&amp;rft.jtitle=The+Robesonian&amp;rft.atitle=Movie+Finances+Are+No+Longer+Hidden+From+Scrutiny&amp;rft.pages=10&amp;rft.date=1963-08-01&amp;rft.aulast=Thomas&amp;rft.aufirst=Bob&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-Atlantic_Monthly_(1973)-382"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-Atlantic_Monthly_(1973)_382-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation book cs1"><a class="mw-redirect" href="/wiki/The_Atlantic_Monthly" title="The Atlantic Monthly"><i>The Atlantic Monthly</i></a>. <b>231</b>. 1973. p. <a class="external text" href="https://books.google.co.uk/books?id=38wmAQAAIAAJ&amp;q=%22As+of+the+end+of+1971,+GWTW+stood+as+the+all-time+money-drawing+movie,+with+a+take+of+$116+million%22&amp;dq=%22As+of+the+end+of+1971,+GWTW+stood+as+the+all-time+money-drawing+movie,+with+a+take+of+$116+million%22" rel="nofollow">2</a>. <q>As of the end of 1971, GWTW stood as the all-time money-drawing movie, with a take of $116 million, and, with this year's reissues, it should continue to run ahead of the second place contender and all-time <i>kaffee-mit-schlag</i> spectacle.</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Abook&amp;rft.genre=book&amp;rft.btitle=The+Atlantic+Monthly&amp;rft.pages=2&amp;rft.date=1973&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-383"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-383">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation book cs1"><a href="/wiki/New_Times_(magazine)" title="New Times (magazine)"><i>New Times</i></a>. <b>2</b>. 1974. <q>Coppola is King Midas, the most individually powerful U.S. filmmaker ." His credits include directing the first <i>Godfather</i> (worldwide earnings: $142 million, ahead of <i>Gone with the Wind</i>, <i>The Sound of Music</i> and <i>The Exorcist</i>)...(<a class="external text" href="https://books.google.co.uk/books?id=YSBXAAAAMAAJ&amp;q=%24142+million" rel="nofollow">Online copy</a> at <a href="/wiki/Google_Books" title="Google Books">Google Books</a>)</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Abook&amp;rft.genre=book&amp;rft.btitle=New+Times&amp;rft.date=1974&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-star-wars_first-run-388"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-star-wars_first-run_388-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation news cs1" id="CITEREFHarmetz1980">Harmetz, Aljean (May 18, 1980). <a class="external text" href="https://www.google.com/search?hl=en&amp;tbm=nws&amp;q=%22star+wars%22++%24410+million" rel="nofollow">"The Saga Beyond 'Star Wars<span class="cs1-kern-right">'</span>"</a>. <i><a href="/wiki/The_New_York_Times" title="The New York Times">The New York Times</a></i>. Archived from <a class="external text" href="https://select.nytimes.com/gst/abstract.html?res=FB0617FE345D17728DDDA10994DD405B8084F1D3" rel="nofollow">the original</a> on January 31, 2012<span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 30,</span> 2012</span>. <q>"Star Wars" has brought 20th Century-Fox approximately $250 million in film rentals ... "Star Wars" grossed $410 million, and his share was enough to allow him to finance its sequel, "The Empire Strikes Back," himself.</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=article&amp;rft.jtitle=The+New+York+Times&amp;rft.atitle=The+Saga+Beyond+%27Star+Wars%27&amp;rft.date=1980-05-18&amp;rft.aulast=Harmetz&amp;rft.aufirst=Aljean&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fselect.nytimes.com%2Fgst%2Fabstract.html%3Fres%3DFB0617FE345D17728DDDA10994DD405B8084F1D3&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
<li id="cite_note-390"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-390">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text"><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="http://www.tcm.com/tcmdb/title/80025/Jurassic-Park/misc-notes.html" rel="nofollow">"Jurassic Park (1993) – Miscellaneous notes"</a>. <a href="/wiki/Turner_Classic_Movies" title="Turner Classic Movies">Turner Classic Movies</a><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">July 9,</span> 2011</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Abook&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.btitle=Jurassic+Park+%281993%29+%E2%80%93+Miscellaneous+notes&amp;rft.pub=Turner+Classic+Movies&amp;rft_id=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.tcm.com%2Ftcmdb%2Ftitle%2F80025%2FJurassic-Park%2Fmisc-notes.html&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></span>
</li>
</ol></div>
<h3><span id=".C2.A7_Franchise_and_series_sources"></span><span class="mw-headline" id="§_Franchise_and_series_sources"><span class="citation wikicite" id="endnote_Franchise_sources§"><a href="#ref_Franchise_sources§"><b><sup>§</sup></b></a></span> Franchise and series sources</span></h3>
<link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1011217839" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><div class="refbegin refbegin-columns references-column-width" style="column-width: 30em">
<ul><li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/franchises/" rel="nofollow">"Franchise Index"</a>. <i><a href="/wiki/Box_Office_Mojo" title="Box Office Mojo">Box Office Mojo</a></i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">April 23,</span> 2015</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Franchise+Index&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Ffranchises%2F&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li><i>Avengers</i>
<ul><li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/franchises/chart/?id=avengersfranchise.htm" rel="nofollow">"Avengers – Worldwide (Unadjusted)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">October 12,</span> 2015</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Avengers+%E2%80%93+Worldwide+%28Unadjusted%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Ffranchises%2Fchart%2F%3Fid%3Davengersfranchise.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>
<li><i>Batman</i>
<ul><li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/franchises/chart/?id=batman.htm" rel="nofollow">"Batman – Worldwide (Unadjusted) &amp; Batman: Mask of the Phantasm"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">July 26,</span> 2016</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Batman+%E2%80%93+Worldwide+%28Unadjusted%29+%26+Batman%3A+Mask+of+the+Phantasm&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Ffranchises%2Fchart%2F%3Fid%3Dbatman.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li>Fathom events
<ul><li>Batman (UK): <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?page=intl&amp;id=batman30.htm" rel="nofollow">"Batman (1989) 30th Anniversary"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">May 25,</span> 2019</span>. <q>UK: $48,482</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Batman+%281989%29+30th+Anniversary&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fpage%3Dintl%26id%3Dbatman30.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li>Batman Returns (UK): <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?page=intl&amp;id=batmanreturnsevent.htm" rel="nofollow">"Batman Returns (Event)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">May 25,</span> 2019</span>. <q>UK: $10,057</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Batman+Returns+%28Event%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fpage%3Dintl%26id%3Dbatmanreturnsevent.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li>Batman Forever: <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?page=intl&amp;id=batmanforeverfathomevent.htm" rel="nofollow">"Batman Forever (Fathom Event)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">May 25,</span> 2019</span>. <q>US: $38,014; UK: $373</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Batman+Forever+%28Fathom+Event%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fpage%3Dintl%26id%3Dbatmanforeverfathomevent.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li>Batman and Robin: <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?page=intl&amp;id=batmanandrobinfathomevent.htm" rel="nofollow">"Batman and Robin (Fathom Event)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">May 25,</span> 2019</span>. <q>US: $28,597; UK: $196</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Batman+and+Robin+%28Fathom+Event%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fpage%3Dintl%26id%3Dbatmanandrobinfathomevent.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>

(1988). <span class="cs1-lock-registration" title="Free registration required"><a class="external text" href="https://archive.org/details/foxthatgotawayt00silv/page/325" rel="nofollow">"Breakeven for Feature Productions: 1966 Releases"</a></span>. <i>The Fox That Got Away: The Last Days of the Zanuck Dynasty at Twentieth Century-Fox</i>. L. Stuart. p. 325.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Abook&amp;rft.genre=bookitem&amp;rft.atitle=Breakeven+for+Feature+Productions%3A+1966+Releases&amp;rft.btitle=The+Fox+That+Got+Away%3A+The+Last+Days+of+the+Zanuck+Dynasty+at+Twentieth+Century-Fox&amp;rft.pages=325&amp;rft.pub=L.+Stuart&amp;rft.date=1988&amp;rft.aulast=Silverman&amp;rft.aufirst=Stephen+M.&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Farchive.org%2Fdetails%2Ffoxthatgotawayt00silv%2Fpage%2F325&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>

Retrieved <span class="nowrap">November 23,</span> 2014</span>. <q>Foreign Total: $6,095,750</q></cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Ice+Age%3A+The+Meltdown+3D+%282014%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2Fintl%2F%3Fpage%3D%26country%3DCH%26wk%3D2014W44%26id%3D_fICEAGETHEMELTDOW01&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>

Retrieved <span class="nowrap">November 25,</span> 2012</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=The+Phantom+Menace&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fid%3Dstarwars.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>

Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 6,</span> 2012</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Attack+of+the+Clones&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fid%3Dstarwars2.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>

Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 6,</span> 2012</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Revenge+of+the+Sith&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fid%3Dstarwars3.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?id=starwarsclonewars.htm" rel="nofollow">"The Clone Wars"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 6,</span> 2012</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=The+Clone+Wars&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fid%3Dstarwarsclonewars.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li>Disney releases (2015–present): <link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/franchises/chart/?id=starwars.htm" rel="nofollow">"Star Wars – Worldwide (Unadjusted)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">October 9,</span> 2018</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Star+Wars+%E2%80%93+Worldwide+%28Unadjusted%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Ffranchises%2Fchart%2F%3Fid%3Dstarwars.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>
<li><i>Superman</i>
<ul><li><i>Superman</i>, <i>Superman Returns</i>, <i>Man of Steel</i> and <i>Batman v Superman</i>:
<ul><li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/franchises/chart/?id=superman.htm" rel="nofollow">"Superman – Worldwide (Unadjusted)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">May 15,</span> 2016</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Superman+%E2%80%93+Worldwide+%28Unadjusted%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Ffranchises%2Fchart%2F%3Fid%3Dsuperman.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>
<li><i>Superman II</i>, <i>Superman III</i> and <i>Superman IV</i>:
<ul><li><a href="#CITEREFBlockWilson2010">Block &amp; Wilson 2010</a>, p. 534. "Superman Franchise Films: All-Release Worldwide Box Office Revenues vs. Production Costs – Equivalent 2005 $s."</li>
<li><a href="#CITEREFBlockWilson2010">Block &amp; Wilson 2010</a>, p. xii. "Notes on Adjusting Dollars and Making Estimates – Adjusting Revenues."</li>
<li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/about/adjuster.htm" rel="nofollow">"Adjusting for Ticket Price Inflation"</a> <span class="cs1-format">(Source: MPAA)</span>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">July 7,</span> 2013</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Adjusting+for+Ticket+Price+Inflation&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fabout%2Fadjuster.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>
<li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.boxofficemojo.com/movies/?id=supergirl.htm" rel="nofollow">"Supergirl (1984)"</a>. <i>Box Office Mojo</i><span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">July 7,</span> 2013</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=Box+Office+Mojo&amp;rft.atitle=Supergirl+%281984%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.boxofficemojo.com%2Fmovies%2F%3Fid%3Dsupergirl.htm&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li>
<li><link href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r999302996" rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style"/><cite class="citation web cs1"><a class="external text" href="https://www.the-numbers.com/movie/Death-of-Superman-The-(2018)/Australia#tab=summary" rel="nofollow">"Australia Box Office for The Death Of Superman / Reign Of The Supermen (2018)"</a>. <i>The Numbers</i>. Nash Information Services<span class="reference-accessdate">. Retrieved <span class="nowrap">January 16,</span> 2019</span>.</cite><span class="Z3988" title="ctx_ver=Z39.88-2004&amp;rft_val_fmt=info%3Aofi%2Ffmt%3Akev%3Amtx%3Ajournal&amp;rft.genre=unknown&amp;rft.jtitle=The+Numbers&amp;rft.atitle=Australia+Box+Office+for+The+Death+Of+Superman+%2F+Reign+Of+The+Supermen+%282018%29&amp;rft_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.the-numbers.com%2Fmovie%2FDeath-of-Superman-The-%282018%29%2FAustralia%23tab%3Dsummary&amp;rfr_id=info%3Asid%2Fen.wikipedia.org%3AList+of+highest-grossing+films"></span></li></ul></li>
<li><i>Toy Story</i>

</div></td></tr><tr><th class="navbox-group" scope="row" style="width:1%">Highest-grossing</th><td class="navbox-list navbox-odd" style="text-align:left;border-left-width:2px;border-left-style:solid;width:100%;padding:0px"><div style="padding:0em 0.25em">

</div>

Searching Through Soup#

Finding the target tags to isolate#

Using example from Wikipedia article where we are trying to isolate the body of the article content.

  • Examine the website using Chrome’s inspect view.

    • Press F12 or right-click > inspect

    • Use the mouse selector tool (top left button) to explore the web page content for your desired target

      • the web page element will be highlighted on the page itself and its corresponding entry in the document tree.

      • Note: click on the web page with the selector in order to keep it selected in the document tree

    • Take note of any identifying attributes for the target tag (class, id, etc)

Using BeautifulSoup’s search functions#

Note: while the process below is a decent summary, there is more nuance to html/css tags than I personally have been able to digest. - If something doesn’t work as expected/explained, please verify in the documentation. - BeauitfulSoup documentation - docs for .find_all()

  • BeautifulSoup has methods for searching through descendent-tags

    • .find

    • .find_all

  • Using .find_all()

    • Searches through all descendent tags and returns a result set (list of tag objects)

# How to get results from .find_all()
results = soup.find_all(name, attrs, recursive, string, limit,**kwargs) `

- `.find_all()` parameters:
    - `name` _(type of tags to consider)_
        - only consider tags with this name 
            - Ex: 'a',  'div', 'p' ,etc.
    - `atrrs`_(css attributes that you are looking for in your target tag)_
        - enter an attribute such as the class or id as a string

            `attrs='mw-content-ltr'`
        - if passing more than one attribute, must use a dictionary:

        `attrs={'class':'mw-content-ltr', 'id':'mw-content-text'}`
    - `recursive`_(Default=True)_
        - search all children (`True`)
        - search only  direct children(`False`)

    - `string`
        - search for text _inside_ of tags instead of the tags themselves
        - can be regular expression
    - `limit`
        - How many results you want it to return

import re
exp = re.compile(r"wikitable sortable plainrowheaders jquery-tablesorter")
exp

re.compile(r'wikitable sortable plainrowheaders jquery-tablesorter',
re.UNICODE)

## Final All Table tags
tables = soup.find_all('table')
len(tables)

93

## Save the first table as its own tag
table = tables[0]
table

SuperPower: pd.read_html#

url

'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_highest-grossing_films'

import pandas as pd
dfs = pd.read_html(url)

list

Level-Up Activity#

  • For each of the movies in our scraped table:

    • Navigate to the movie’s wikipedia page.

    • Save the top-right dark gray box with the summary info for the movie.

        movie_urls.append(tag['href'])

## Get all wikipedia links

Joining Together Links#

url

'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_highest-grossing_films'

import os
os.path

<module 'posixpath' from '/opt/anaconda3/envs/learn-env-new/lib/python3.8/posixpath.py'>

import urllib
parsed = urllib.parse.urlparse(url)
parsed

ParseResult(scheme='https', netloc='en.wikipedia.org', path='/wiki/List_of_highest-grossing_films', params='', query='', fragment='')

# parsed.scheme+parsed.netloc

'httpsen.wikipedia.org'

urllib.parse.urljoin(url,movie_urls[0])

'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avengers:_Endgame'

## Make full links for full list
abs_urls = [urllib.parse.urljoin(url,url_movie) for url_movie in movie_urls]
abs_urls

Getting the info Box for the first movie#

## Make a soup for the first url in full_urls
resp2 = requests.get(abs_urls[0])
soup2 = bs4.BeautifulSoup(resp2.content)
soup2

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="client-nojs" dir="ltr" lang="en">
<head>

<h1 class="firstHeading" id="firstHeading"><i>Avengers: Endgame</i></h1>
<div class="mw-body-content" id="bodyContent">
<div class="noprint" id="siteSub">From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia</div>
<div id="contentSub"></div>
<div id="contentSub2"></div>
<div id="jump-to-nav"></div>
<a class="mw-jump-link" href="#mw-head">Jump to navigation</a>
<a class="mw-jump-link" href="#searchInput">Jump to search</a>
<div class="mw-content-ltr" dir="ltr" id="mw-content-text" lang="en"><div class="mw-parser-output"><div class="shortdescription nomobile noexcerpt noprint searchaux" style="display:none">2019 superhero film produced by Marvel Studios</div>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p>
<table class="infobox vevent" style="width:22em;font-size:90%;"><tbody><tr><th class="summary" colspan="2" style="text-align:center;font-size:125%;font-weight:bold;font-size:110%;font-style:italic;">Avengers: Endgame</th></tr><tr><td colspan="2" style="text-align:center"><a class="image" href="/wiki/File:Avengers_Endgame_poster.jpg" title='The theatrical release poster for "Avengers: Endgame". The characters depicted are seen on a starry background.'><img alt='The theatrical release poster for "Avengers: Endgame". The characters depicted are seen on a starry background.' class="thumbborder" data-file-height="326" data-file-width="220" decoding="async" height="326" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/0/0d/Avengers_Endgame_poster.jpg" width="220"/></a><div style="font-size:95%;padding:0.35em 0.35em 0.25em;line-height:1.25em;">Theatrical release poster</div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Directed by</th><td><a href="/wiki/Russo_brothers" title="Russo brothers"><div class="plainlist"><ul><li>Anthony Russo</li><li>Joe Russo</li></ul></div></a></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Produced by</th><td><a href="/wiki/Kevin_Feige" title="Kevin Feige">Kevin Feige</a></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Screenplay by</th><td><a href="/wiki/Christopher_Markus_and_Stephen_McFeely" title="Christopher Markus and Stephen McFeely"><div class="plainlist"><ul><li>Christopher Markus</li><li>Stephen McFeely</li></ul></div></a></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Based on</th><td><div><i><a href="/wiki/Avengers_(comics)" title="Avengers (comics)">The Avengers</a></i><br/>by <div class="plainlist" style="display: inline"><ul style="display: inline"><li style="display: inline"><a href="/wiki/Stan_Lee" title="Stan Lee">Stan Lee</a></li><li><a href="/wiki/Jack_Kirby" title="Jack Kirby">Jack Kirby</a></li></ul></div></div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Starring</th><td><div class="plainlist">
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/Robert_Downey_Jr." title="Robert Downey Jr.">Robert Downey Jr.</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Chris_Evans_(actor)" title="Chris Evans (actor)">Chris Evans</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Mark_Ruffalo" title="Mark Ruffalo">Mark Ruffalo</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Chris_Hemsworth" title="Chris Hemsworth">Chris Hemsworth</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Scarlett_Johansson" title="Scarlett Johansson">Scarlett Johansson</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Jeremy_Renner" title="Jeremy Renner">Jeremy Renner</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Don_Cheadle" title="Don Cheadle">Don Cheadle</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Paul_Rudd" title="Paul Rudd">Paul Rudd</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Brie_Larson" title="Brie Larson">Brie Larson</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Karen_Gillan" title="Karen Gillan">Karen Gillan</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Danai_Gurira" title="Danai Gurira">Danai Gurira</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Benedict_Wong" title="Benedict Wong">Benedict Wong</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Jon_Favreau" title="Jon Favreau">Jon Favreau</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Bradley_Cooper" title="Bradley Cooper">Bradley Cooper</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Gwyneth_Paltrow" title="Gwyneth Paltrow">Gwyneth Paltrow</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Josh_Brolin" title="Josh Brolin">Josh Brolin</a></li></ul>
</div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Music by</th><td><a href="/wiki/Alan_Silvestri" title="Alan Silvestri">Alan Silvestri</a></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Cinematography</th><td><a href="/wiki/Trent_Opaloch" title="Trent Opaloch">Trent Opaloch</a></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Edited by</th><td><div class="plainlist">
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/Jeffrey_Ford_(film_editor)" title="Jeffrey Ford (film editor)">Jeffrey Ford</a></li>
<li><a href="/wiki/Matthew_Schmidt" title="Matthew Schmidt">Matthew Schmidt</a></li></ul>
</div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;"><div style="display:inline-block; padding:0.1em 0;line-height:1.2em;">Production<br/>company </div></th><td><div style="vertical-align:middle;"><a href="/wiki/Marvel_Studios" title="Marvel Studios">Marvel Studios</a></div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Distributed by</th><td><a href="/wiki/Walt_Disney_Studios_Motion_Pictures" title="Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures">Walt Disney Studios<br/>Motion Pictures</a></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;"><div style="display:inline-block; padding:0.1em 0;line-height:1.2em;white-space:normal;">Release date</div></th><td><div class="plainlist">
<ul><li>April 22, 2019<span style="display:none"> (<span class="bday dtstart published updated">2019-04-22</span>)</span> (<a href="/wiki/Los_Angeles_Convention_Center" title="Los Angeles Convention Center">Los Angeles Convention Center</a>)</li>
<li>April 26, 2019<span style="display:none"> (<span class="bday dtstart published updated">2019-04-26</span>)</span> (United States)</li></ul>
</div></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;"><div style="display:inline-block; padding:0.1em 0;line-height:1.2em;white-space:normal;">Running time</div></th><td>181 minutes<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-Runtime_1-0"><a href="#cite_note-Runtime-1">[1]</a></sup></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Country</th><td>United States</td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Language</th><td>English</td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Budget</th><td>$356<span class="nowrap"> </span>million<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-DeadlineProfitAnalysis_2-0"><a href="#cite_note-DeadlineProfitAnalysis-2">[2]</a></sup></td></tr><tr><th scope="row" style="white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.65em;">Box office</th><td>$2.798<span class="nowrap"> </span>billion<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-TheNumbers_3-0"><a href="#cite_note-TheNumbers-3">[3]</a></sup></td></tr></tbody></table>
<p><i><b>Avengers: Endgame</b></i> is a 2019 American <a href="/wiki/Superhero_film" title="Superhero film">superhero film</a> based on the <a href="/wiki/Marvel_Comics" title="Marvel Comics">Marvel Comics</a> superhero team the <a href="/wiki/Avengers_(comics)" title="Avengers (comics)">Avengers</a>. Produced by <a href="/wiki/Marvel_Studios" title="Marvel Studios">Marvel Studios</a> and distributed by <a href="/wiki/Walt_Disney_Studios_Motion_Pictures" title="Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures">Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures</a>, it is the direct sequel to <i><a href="/wiki/Avengers:_Infinity_War" title="Avengers: Infinity War">Avengers: Infinity War</a></i> (2018) and <a href="/wiki/List_of_Marvel_Cinematic_Universe_films" title="List of Marvel Cinematic Universe films">the 22nd film</a> in the <a href="/wiki/Marvel_Cinematic_Universe" title="Marvel Cinematic Universe">Marvel Cinematic Universe</a> (MCU). Directed by <a class="mw-redirect" href="/wiki/Anthony_and_Joe_Russo" title="Anthony and Joe Russo">Anthony and Joe Russo</a> and written by <a href="/wiki/Christopher_Markus_and_Stephen_McFeely" title="Christopher Markus and Stephen McFeely">Christopher Markus and Stephen McFeely</a>, the film features an <a href="/wiki/Ensemble_cast" title="Ensemble cast">ensemble cast</a> including <a href="/wiki/Robert_Downey_Jr." title="Robert Downey Jr.">Robert Downey Jr.</a>, <a href="/wiki/Chris_Evans_(actor)" title="Chris Evans (actor)">Chris Evans</a>, <a href="/wiki/Mark_Ruffalo" title="Mark Ruffalo">Mark Ruffalo</a>, <a href="/wiki/Chris_Hemsworth" title="Chris Hemsworth">Chris Hemsworth</a>, <a href="/wiki/Scarlett_Johansson" title="Scarlett Johansson">Scarlett Johansson</a>, <a href="/wiki/Jeremy_Renner" title="Jeremy Renner">Jeremy Renner</a>, <a href="/wiki/Don_Cheadle" title="Don Cheadle">Don Cheadle</a>, <a href="/wiki/Paul_Rudd" title="Paul Rudd">Paul Rudd</a>, <a href="/wiki/Brie_Larson" title="Brie Larson">Brie Larson</a>, <a href="/wiki/Karen_Gillan" title="Karen Gillan">Karen Gillan</a>, <a href="/wiki/Danai_Gurira" title="Danai Gurira">Danai Gurira</a>, <a href="/wiki/Benedict_Wong" title="Benedict Wong">Benedict Wong</a>, <a href="/wiki/Jon_Favreau" title="Jon Favreau">Jon Favreau</a>, <a href="/wiki/Bradley_Cooper" title="Bradley Cooper">Bradley Cooper</a>, <a href="/wiki/Gwyneth_Paltrow" title="Gwyneth Paltrow">Gwyneth Paltrow</a>, and <a href="/wiki/Josh_Brolin" title="Josh Brolin">Josh Brolin</a>. In the film, the surviving members of the <a class="mw-redirect" href="/wiki/Avengers_(Marvel_Cinematic_Universe)" title="Avengers (Marvel Cinematic Universe)">Avengers</a> and their allies attempt to reverse the damage caused by <a href="/wiki/Thanos_(Marvel_Cinematic_Universe)" title="Thanos (Marvel Cinematic Universe)">Thanos</a> in <i>Infinity War</i>.
</p><p>The film was announced in October 2014 as <i>Avengers: Infinity War – Part 2</i>, but Marvel later removed this title. The Russo brothers joined as directors in April 2015, with Markus and McFeely signing on to write the script a month later. The film serves as a conclusion to the story of the MCU up to that point, ending the story arcs for several main characters. The plot revisits several moments from earlier films, bringing back actors and settings from throughout the franchise, as well as music from previous films. <a href="/wiki/Production_of_Avengers:_Infinity_War_and_Avengers:_Endgame" title="Production of Avengers: Infinity War and Avengers: Endgame">Filming</a> began in August 2017 at <a class="mw-redirect" href="/wiki/Pinewood_Atlanta_Studios" title="Pinewood Atlanta Studios">Pinewood Atlanta Studios</a> in <a href="/wiki/Fayette_County,_Georgia" title="Fayette County, Georgia">Fayette County, Georgia</a>, shooting <a href="/wiki/Back-to-back_film_production" title="Back-to-back film production">back-to-back</a> with <i>Infinity War</i>, and ended in January 2018. Additional filming took place in the <a href="/wiki/Atlanta_metropolitan_area" title="Atlanta metropolitan area">Metro</a> and <a href="/wiki/Downtown_Atlanta" title="Downtown Atlanta">Downtown Atlanta</a> areas, New York state, Scotland, and England. The official title was revealed in December 2018. With an estimated budget of $356<span class="nowrap"> </span>million, the film is one of the <a href="/wiki/List_of_most_expensive_films" title="List of most expensive films">most expensive films</a> ever made.
</p><p><i>Avengers: Endgame</i> premiered in Los Angeles on April 22, 2019, and was released in the United States on April 26, as part of <a href="/wiki/Marvel_Cinematic_Universe:_Phase_Three" title="Marvel Cinematic Universe: Phase Three">Phase Three</a> of the MCU. The film received praise for its direction, acting, musical score, action sequences, visual effects, and emotional weight, with critics lauding its culmination of the 22-film story. The film grossed $2.798 billion worldwide, surpassing <i>Infinity War</i><span class="nowrap" style="padding-left:0.1em;">'</span>s entire theatrical run in just eleven days and breaking numerous <a href="/wiki/List_of_box_office_records_set_by_Avengers:_Endgame" title="List of box office records set by Avengers: Endgame">box office records</a>, including becoming the <a href="/wiki/List_of_highest-grossing_films#Highest-grossing_films" title="List of highest-grossing films">highest-grossing film of all time</a>. The film received <a href="/wiki/List_of_accolades_received_by_Avengers:_Endgame" title="List of accolades received by Avengers: Endgame">numerous awards and nominations</a>, including a nomination for <a href="/wiki/Academy_Award_for_Best_Visual_Effects" title="Academy Award for Best Visual Effects">Best Visual Effects</a> at the <a href="/wiki/92nd_Academy_Awards" title="92nd Academy Awards">92nd Academy Awards</a>, three nominations at the <a href="/wiki/25th_Critics%27_Choice_Awards" title="25th Critics' Choice Awards">25th Critics' Choice Awards</a> (winning two), and a nomination for <a href="/wiki/BAFTA_Award_for_Best_Special_Visual_Effects" title="BAFTA Award for Best Special Visual Effects">Special Visual Effects</a> at the <a href="/wiki/73rd_British_Academy_Film_Awards" title="73rd British Academy Film Awards">73rd British Academy Film Awards</a>.
</p>
